events.title: George Michael would have been 63
events.blurb: Today marks what would have been the 63rd birthday of the iconic British singer-songwriter George Michael, who passed away in 2016.

angles.name: George Michael Tribute
angles.copy: Remembering the incredible voice and songwriting talent of George Michael on what would have been his 63rd birthday.

events.title: Anniversary of Michael Jackson's passing
events.blurb: Today marks 17 years since the music world lost the King of Pop, Michael Jackson, who died in 2009.

angles.name: MJ Death Anniversary
angles.copy: Seventeen years today since we said goodbye to the King of Pop. Michael Jackson's music continues to define generations.

events.title: Ringo Starr turns 86
events.blurb: Legendary Beatles drummer Ringo Starr celebrates his 86th birthday today.

angles.name: Ringo Birthday Wish
angles.copy: Happy 86th birthday to the one and only Ringo Starr! Still keeping the beat for generations.

events.title: Brian May turns 79
events.blurb: Queen's iconic guitarist and astrophysicist Brian May celebrates his 79th birthday today.

angles.name: Brian May Birthday
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 79th birthday to Queen's legendary guitarist, Brian May.

events.title: Mick Jagger turns 83
events.blurb: The Rolling Stones frontman Mick Jagger celebrates his 83rd birthday today.

angles.name: Mick Jagger Birthday
angles.copy: Eighty-three years young! Rock and roll legend Mick Jagger is still going strong.

events.title: MTV turns 45
events.blurb: Music Television, MTV, launched 45 years ago today, famously kicking off with The Buggles' "Video Killed The Radio Star".

angles.name: MTV Anniversary
angles.copy: Forty-five years ago, MTV launched with a song that ironically predicted its own future.

events.title: Oasis' 'Definitely Maybe' turns 32
events.blurb: Oasis released their seminal debut album 'Definitely Maybe' 32 years ago today, marking a pivotal moment in Britpop history.

angles.name: Definitely Maybe Anniversary
angles.copy: Thirty-two years since Oasis dropped 'Definitely Maybe' and changed the sound of British music forever.

events.title: Woodstock Festival: 57 years on
events.blurb: The legendary Woodstock Music & Art Fair, a defining moment of the counterculture era, began 57 years ago today.

angles.name: Woodstock Anniversary
angles.copy: Take a trip back to 1969: 57 years ago today, the iconic Woodstock Festival kicked off.

events.title: Anniversary of Elvis Presley's passing
events.blurb: Today marks 49 years since the world lost the King of Rock and Roll, Elvis Presley, who passed away in 1977.

angles.name: Elvis Death Anniversary
angles.copy: Remembering Elvis Presley, 49 years on. His legacy as the King of Rock and Roll lives on.

events.title: Anniversary of Tupac Shakur's death
events.blurb: Today marks 30 years since influential rapper Tupac Shakur was fatally shot in Las Vegas.

angles.name: Tupac Death Anniversary
angles.copy: Thirty years ago, the music world lost a powerful voice. Remembering Tupac Shakur today.

events.title: Anniversary of Jimi Hendrix's passing
events.blurb: Today marks 56 years since the legendary guitarist Jimi Hendrix passed away in London.

angles.name: Jimi Hendrix Death Anniversary
angles.copy: Fifty-six years today, we lost a true guitar icon. Remembering the unparalleled talent of Jimi Hendrix.

events.title: The Beatles' 'Abbey Road' turns 57
events.blurb: The Beatles released their eleventh studio album, 'Abbey Road', 57 years ago today.

angles.name: Abbey Road Anniversary
angles.copy: That iconic zebra crossing... 57 years ago today, The Beatles gave us 'Abbey Road'.

events.title: Chrissie Hynde turns 75
events.blurb: The Pretenders' frontwoman Chrissie Hynde celebrates her 75th birthday today.

angles.name: Chrissie Hynde Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 75th birthday to the incredible Chrissie Hynde, still rocking with The Pretenders.

events.title: Liam Gallagher turns 54
events.blurb: Oasis and Beady Eye frontman Liam Gallagher celebrates his 54th birthday today.

angles.name: Liam Gallagher Birthday
angles.copy: Our Kid is another year older! Happy 54th birthday to the one and only Liam Gallagher.

events.title: John Lennon's 'Imagine' released 51 years ago
events.blurb: John Lennon's iconic anthem 'Imagine' was released 51 years ago today.

angles.name: Imagine Anniversary
angles.copy: Fifty-one years since John Lennon asked us to 'Imagine'. A timeless message.

events.title: The original iPod turns 25
events.blurb: Apple revolutionized portable music 25 years ago today with the release of the very first iPod.

angles.name: iPod Anniversary
angles.copy: Remember the click wheel? Twenty-five years ago, the original iPod changed how we listened to music forever.

events.title: Happy James Bond Day!
events.blurb: Today is James Bond Day, celebrating 007 and the release of the first Bond film, 'Dr. No', in 1962.

angles.name: James Bond Day
angles.copy: Licence to thrill! It's James Bond Day – what's your favourite Bond film or theme tune?

events.title: John Lennon would have been 86
events.blurb: Today marks what would have been the 86th birthday of The Beatles' co-founder John Lennon, who passed away in 1980.

angles.name: John Lennon Tribute
angles.copy: Remembering the visionary John Lennon on what would have been his 86th birthday. His music still inspires.
